storage_policy_note: Because repository visibility could not be verified, raw copyrighted PDFs and full extracted text were not committed. This inventory records protected local source metadata and the expected repo-local paths for a future approved private/internal workflow.

sources.title: Lashon Hakodesh: Mastering The Basics
sources.author: Nachman Marcuson
warnings: OCR is sparse and incomplete across much of the scanned textbook.
Hebrew, nekudos, arrows, tables, and bidirectional text require human review.
Copied textbook pages must not become runtime or student-facing content.
sources.notes: Inspected locally from Downloads. PDF title metadata reads 'loshon 2'. The paired answer booklet title indicates this workbook/textbook belongs to the 'Mastering The Basics' set.

sources.title: Answer Booklet to Lashon Hakodesh: Mastering The Basics
sources.author: Nachman Marcuson
warnings: Answer booklet content must never become student-facing runtime content.
OCR is cleaner than the earlier inspected copy but still requires human review before any derived use.
Hebrew, nekudos, arrows, tables, and bidirectional text require human review.
Full answer content was intentionally not committed to the repo.
sources.notes: Cleaner answer-booklet scan/OCR verified after the initial ingestion pass. This copy exposes OCR-readable contents, introduction, and Lessons 1-16, so it replaces the earlier lower-quality answer-booklet metadata as the preferred teacher-only answer source.

sources.title: Answer Booklet to Lashon Hakodesh: Mastering The Basics

sources.notes: Initial pass observed only partial OCR readability from the then-available 33-page combined answer booklet copy. Preserved as provenance after later reinspection identified a cleaner replacement scan/OCR.

sources.title: Lashon Hakodesh answer booklet partial duplicate
sources.author: Nachman Marcuson

sources.notes: Thirteen-page file that appears to be a partial slice of the larger answer booklet. No evidence was found that it contains missing pages not covered by the combined full booklet.
